claims.claim: The three sources are Japanese e-commerce and television shopping websites (Shop Channel, B-Shop, and Shop Japan)
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this claim and it is directly verifiable from the source articles which are indeed Japanese shopping websites

claims.claim: The sources contain product listings, prices, and promotional content in Japanese
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this claim and it is directly verifiable from the Japanese text and pricing information in yen in the sources

claims.claim: The sources were labeled as Bulgarian language sources covering economics topics

claims.claim: The sources contain no information about Bulgarian domestic politics, governance, economy, society, or culture
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this claim and it is verifiable by examining the source content which contains only Japanese shopping content

claims.claim: The sources discuss Japanese retail products including soy milk makers

claims.claim: The sources contain Japanese yen pricing
claims.reasoning: Agent 2 reported this claim and it is directly verifiable in source 1 which shows multiple prices in yen format like '¥5,360', '¥4,380', etc.

claims.claim: The sources contain items such as crocodile leather bags
